creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Unfortunately FreeBSD 10.1 went out of support December 31, 2016.  In fact, the last supported branch of FreeBSD 10 (10.4) just recently went out of support: October 31, 2018.  At the moment the only supported release is 11.2 which means you need to upgrade.

Please see https://www.freebsd.org/security/unsupported.html .
